description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, streamlined design. The headband is broad and slightly cushioned, arching smoothly to connect the two large, circular ear cups. The ear cups are padded with thick, black cushions that appear soft and comfortable, likely made from synthetic leather or foam. The outer shell of the ear cups and the headband are finished in a matte gray or silver plastic, with metallic accents around the ear pads. Small screws and a circular port or button are visible on the bottom of the ear cups, suggesting possible adjustability or connectivity. The overall build suggests durability and comfort, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with thick black ear cushions and a matte gray headband, featuring metallic accents and a sleek, comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, padded ear cups and the arching headband, highlighting the comfort-focused design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thickness of the ear pads, the headband's width, and visible screws and a circular port or button on the ear cup.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the symmetry and plushness of the ear cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup's side with matching screws and port/button details.
